---
title: '#Example2'
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-03"
---

Import or Load the data into the workspace

```{r}
load("D:/R Practice/#Classworks/#Example2/profits.Rdata")
```

The last 6 rows of the data are the following 

```{r}
round(tail(profits),3)
```
The data are related to 500 units and there are three continuous variables denoted ad y, x1 and x2 


We provide description of the observations:
```{r}
library(skimr)
skim_without_charts(profits)
```

We visualize the realizations in a scatterplot of each single variable

```{r}
plot(profits$y, ylab="Profits",
     type="p",
     ylim = c(-11, 14),
     pch = 16, cex = 0.4,
     col="red")
     abline(h = 0)

```
Empirical density 

```{r}
plot(density(profits$y))
```
